title: Baby Hooded Bath Wrap for Girls and Boys - Bunny Head Hood - Baby Bathtime 100% Soft Cotton, 70x70 cm Baby Towel 0-12 Months (Powder Blue)
features: BUNNY DESIGN: Created to keep kids entertained and looking forward to bath times.
QUICK DRYING: Premium quality and fast drying, these 450GSM towels are great at drying babies & children in a fun and interactive way.
PREMIUM QUALITY: Produced from the very best quality Turkish cotton. Our towels will stay beautifully soft and supple, even after washing them.
BEAUTIFUL COLOURS: This towel comes in 5 beautiful colours to make bathtime fun and colourful
MACHINE WASHABLE: Wash at 40° C. Can Be Tumble Dried. Medium heat iron
description: The Baby Bunny Towel is a stunning 100% cotton hooded towel for children (from Newborn and up). Who can resist the adorable Bunny Hooded Towel? Made from the softest cotton and featuring the sweetest bunny ears, along with the embroidered whiskers to add a delightful touch to this beautifully soft towel, perfect for any occasion. It's as practical as it is beautiful. The hood helps keep chills away, so little ones can dry off quicker. The bunny ears towel is the ideal companion for trips to the beach or swimming pool as well as snuggling in at bath time. Our towels deliver superior quality, supreme comfort, warmth and softness. By only using the finest soft and super-absorbent 100% cotton towelling, our silky soft towels stay plush and snuggly wash after wash. BUNNY DESIGN: Created to keep kids entertained and looking forward to bath times. QUICK DRYING: Premium quality and fast drying, these 450GSM towels are great at drying babies & children in a fun and interactive way. PREMIUM QUALITY: Produced from the very best quality Turkish cotton. Our towels will stay beautifully soft and supple, even after washing them. BEAUTIFUL COLOURS: This towel comes in 5 beautiful colours to make bathtime fun and colourful MACHINE WASHABLE: Wash at 40° C. Can Be Tumble Dried. Medium heat iron
